name: User Registration Performance Test — /api/v1/users/register
description: Validate the User Registration endpoint performance under concurrent load, ensuring p95 response time, error rate, and throughput meet NFR targets while simulating up to 100 concurrent users.
corresponding NFR: NFR 1: User Registration (Create Operation) — POST /api/v1/users/register must achieve p95 ≤ 500 ms, error rate < 1%, throughput ≥ 150 requests/sec, while simulating up to 100 concurrent users.
preconditions: The email and username must be unique per test run (append timestamp or use random data).
Authentication is not required for this endpoint.
Application must be in a clean state (avoid email duplication).

input data.payload_uniqueness_rule: Append timestamp or random suffix to username and email per iteration/user to ensure uniqueness.

notes: Defaults applied where required to complete input data: duration_s=300 (steady run) and think_time_s=[1,3]. Ensure unique username/email per request to prevent duplicate-registration errors from inflating error rate.
